system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.thongkesoluong_baocao_hangtrang","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[THONGKESOLUONG_BAOCAO_HANGTRANG]
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT A.maddh, A.soluong as soluong_yc,B.masp, B.mact, B.chitiet, B.nguyenlieu, B.soluong_tc, A.soluong
	INTO #DINHMUC_DONHANG
	FROM (SELECT * FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet WHERE chitiet LIKE 'W%') A
	  INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp = B.masp
	  LEFT JOIN tr_dondathang C ON A.maddh = C.maddh
	WHERE A.active = 1 AND C.trangthai NOT IN(-1,3)


	SELECT madonhang, masp1, mact, tenct, nguyenlieu, congdoan , SUM(soluong) AS soluong
	INTO #SANXUAT
	FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat
	WHERE congdoan in ('uvp','DPHOIP','DHIP','LRAP','DP01-PROD','DH02-PROD','LR02-PROD')
	--WHERE congdoan in ('uvp')
	  --AND madonhang = 'DQH-VFM03/0723'
	  --AND masp1 = '5166VN_EDW002_EPO'
	GROUP BY madonhang, masp1, mact, tenct, nguyenlieu, congdoan

	SELECT madonhang, masp1, mact, tenct, nguyenlieu, congdoan , SUM(soluong) AS soluong
	INTO #SANXUAT_HISTORY
	FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat
	WHERE congdoan in ('uvp','DPHOIP','DHIP','LRAP','DP01-PROD','DH02-PROD','LR02-PROD')
		AND CAST(ngaytao as date) < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
	--WHERE congdoan in ('uvp')
	  --AND madonhang = 'DQH-VFM03/0723'
	  --AND masp1 = '5166VN_EDW002_EPO'
	GROUP BY madonhang, masp1, mact, tenct, nguyenlieu, congdoan


	SELECT A.maddh, A.masp,MIN(A.soluong_per) AS bosanpham ,a.congdoan,CAST(A.soluong_yc as float) as soluong_yc
	into #RESULT1
	FROM (
	SELECT A.maddh, A.masp, A.mact, A.chitiet, A.nguyenlieu, 
	  A.soluong_tc, A.soluong_yc,b.congdoan,
	  FLOOR(ISNULL(B.soluong, 0) / A.soluong_tc) AS soluong_per
	FROM #DINHMUC_DONHANG A
	  LEFT JOIN #SANXUAT B ON A.masp = B.masp1 AND A.mact = B.mact AND A.maddh = B.madonhang
	WHERE A.soluong_tc > 0 
	  --AND A.maddh = 'DQH-VFM02/0623'
	  --and A.mact = '28419'
	  --AND a.masp = 'CT-FRVAWH_VAN001/VAT002_PKD'
	  AND ISNULL(A.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0')
	) A
	GROUP BY A.maddh, A.masp ,a.congdoan,A.soluong_yc

	SELECT A.maddh, A.masp,MIN(A.soluong_per) AS bosanpham_history ,a.congdoan,CAST(A.soluong_yc as float) as soluong_yc
	into #RESULT1_HISTORY
	FROM (
	SELECT A.maddh, A.masp, A.mact, A.chitiet, A.nguyenlieu, 
	  A.soluong_tc, A.soluong_yc,b.congdoan,
	  FLOOR(ISNULL(B.soluong, 0) / A.soluong_tc) AS soluong_per
	FROM #DINHMUC_DONHANG A
	  LEFT JOIN #SANXUAT_HISTORY B ON A.masp = B.masp1 AND A.mact = B.mact AND A.maddh = B.madonhang
	WHERE A.soluong_tc > 0 
	  --AND A.maddh = 'DQH-VFM02/0623'
	  --and A.mact = '28419'
	  --AND a.masp = 'CT-FRVAWH_VAN001/VAT002_PKD'
	  AND ISNULL(A.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0')
	) A
	GROUP BY A.maddh, A.masp ,a.congdoan,A.soluong_yc

	SELECT *,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'DPHOIP' THEN bosanpham ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DP,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'DHIP' THEN bosanpham ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DH,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'UVP' THEN bosanpham ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_UV,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'LRAP' THEN bosanpham ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_LRAP,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'DP01-PROD' THEN bosanpham ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DP_2,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'DH02-PROD' THEN bosanpham ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DH_2,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'LR02-PROD' THEN bosanpham ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_LRAP_2
	into #RESULT2
	FROM #RESULT1

	SELECT *,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'DPHOIP' THEN bosanpham_history ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DP_history,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'DHIP' THEN bosanpham_history ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DH_history,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'UVP' THEN bosanpham_history ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_UV_history,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'LRAP' THEN bosanpham_history ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_LRAP_history,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'DP01-PROD' THEN bosanpham_history ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DP_history_2,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'DH02-PROD' THEN bosanpham_history ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DH_history_2,
			(CASE WHEN congdoan = 'LR02-PROD' THEN bosanpham_history ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_LRAP_history_2
	into #RESULT2_HISTORY
	FROM #RESULT1_HISTORY

	select A.maddh,A.masp,B.tensp,A.soluong_yc,
		   iif(A.soluong_DP > 0,A.soluong_DP,A.soluong_DP_2) as soluong_DP,
		   CAST(CAST(iif(A.soluong_DP > 0,A.soluong_DP,A.soluong_DP_2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.soluong_yc AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS DP_PERCENT,
		   (CASE WHEN iif(isnull(A.soluong_DP,0) > 0, A.soluong_DP,isnull(A.soluong_DP_2,0)) > iif(isnull(C.soluong_DP_history,0)>0,C.soluong_DP_history,isnull(C.soluong_DP_history_2,0)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DP_history,

		   iif(A.soluong_DH> 0,A.soluong_DH,A.soluong_DH_2) as soluong_DH,
		   CAST(CAST(iif(A.soluong_DH > 0,A.soluong_DH,A.soluong_DH_2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.soluong_yc AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS DH_PERCENT
		   ,(CASE WHEN iif(isnull(A.soluong_DH,0) > 0, A.soluong_DH,isnull(A.soluong_DH_2,0)) > iif(isnull(C.soluong_DH_history,0)> 0, C.soluong_DH_history,isnull(C.soluong_DH_history_2,0)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_DH_history,

		   A.soluong_UV,
		   CAST(CAST(A.soluong_UV AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.soluong_yc AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS UV_PERCENT
		   ,(CASE WHEN isnull(A.soluong_UV,0) > isnull(C.soluong_UV_history,0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_UV_history,

		   iif(A.soluong_LRAP > 0, A.soluong_LRAP, A.soluong_LRAP_2) as soluong_LRAP,
		   CAST(CAST(iif(A.soluong_LRAP>0,A.soluong_LRAP,A.soluong_LRAP_2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.soluong_yc AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS LRAP_PERCENT
		   ,(CASE WHEN iif(isnull(A.soluong_LRAP,0)>0,A.soluong_LRAP,A.soluong_LRAP_2) > iif(isnull(C.soluong_LRAP_history,0)>0,C.soluong_LRAP_history,isnull(C.soluong_LRAP_history_2,0)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS soluong_LRAP_history
	from #RESULT2 A
	LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = b.masp
	LEFT JOIN #RESULT2_HISTORY C ON A.maddh = C.maddh AND A.masp = C.masp

	DROP table #SANXUAT, #DINHMUC_DONHANG,#RESULT1,#RESULT2,#SANXUAT_HISTORY,#RESULT1_HISTORY,#RESULT2_HISTORY

END







","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_trangthai_sanxuat"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
